current_status_summary: Phase 31 cold boot initialized. Executing Thermodynamic Precision Truncation Attack. Mapping Turing Machine finite S-bit tape precision bounds against the infinite-depth Full Replica Symmetry Breaking 3SAT landscape to isolate truncation-induced gradient destruction.
acknowledged_critic_fallacies: Algebraic and Groebner bases are permanently abandoned. TMs cannot bypass discrete moats via continuous tunneling because float representations are constrained by poly(n) tape bits, inherently discretizing any continuous gradient assumption and bounding resolution.
alpha_directive: Create Lean 4 definition for S-bounded Dyadic Tape Space. Define a structure TMTape (S : Nat) strictly modeling dyadic rationals bounded by precision 2^(-S). Construct a rigorous proof term bounding the cardinality of TMTape(S) without using sorry or axiom.
beta_directive: Formulate Lean 4 definitions for the continuous FRSB landscape projection. Define FRSB_Gradient_Step (n : Nat) mapping to Reals. Draft the initial lemma establishing that exact gradient representation of the FRSB fractal requires infinite precision bits.
critic_target: Scrutinize the precision mapping between Beta's continuous FRSB_Gradient_Step and Alpha's discrete TMTape. Validate that the truncation error epsilon strictly forces discrete trial-and-error state transitions for any S bounded by poly(n).
